_comment: Initial firm config for Escritório Demo (T25). Partial overrides — parseFirmConfig (packages/config) fills every omitted field with its default (departments, taxRegimes, monitoredKinds, taxonomy, routingMap, statusVocabularies). Stored in firms.config (JSONB); editable later via the Settings screen. Validate the taxonomy/routing with the partner before relying on AI triage.
